title: Design prompt routing fix
details: CSS designer, dashboard screenshot, and HTML/CSS prompt requests now route to the focused design/persona prompt builder instead of the software blueprint builder.

title: Lean optimizer reset
details: Removed the platform features that were getting in the way and returned the app to a focused Hermes-powered prompt optimizer.

title: Prompt scaffolding cleanup
details: Removed internal model-specific, memory/reuse, and original-idea helper notes from final optimized prompts while keeping those signals internal to the builder.

title: Prompt relevance routing
details: Added focused prompt-building modes so design/persona prompts and software/system prompts stay aligned with the raw user request.
